analysis.consistency: High. The spell description is internally consistent with standard D&D 5e mechanics for a 3rd-level spell of Evocation school.
analysis.quality: Good. The description clearly outlines the dimensions, shape restrictions, duration, and mechanical effects (damage/saving throw, environmental blocking). The flavor text aligns well with the name.

mechanics.components: V, S, M (a tiny fan and a feather of exotic origin)

area_of_effect.restriction: Must have one continuous path along the ground

effects: Deals 3d8 bludgeoning damage (half on success) on initial appearance.
Prevents Small or smaller flying creatures/objects from passing through.
Deflects ordinary projectiles launched at targets behind the wall upward (does not affect large projectiles like boulders).
Prevents creatures in gaseous form from passing through.
mechanics.notes: The damage upon appearance is unusual for a purely defensive/utility wall spell, but mechanically sound. The deflection rules are specific and balanced for the level.
